chrome.name: SiteHeader
chrome.theme_behavior: always-transparent fixed bar; ScrollOrchestrator toggles is-light on #site-header to contrast band beneath
constraints: home-only; do not reuse on internal pages (use PageHeader)

chrome.name: PageHeader
used_on: all internal pages (~20 routes): product/*, trust/*, company/*, pricing, blog/layout, sitemap, not-found, dev/section-lab
chrome.theme_behavior: blurred glass bar; theme sets SSR surface; renders HeaderThemeSync which flips page-header--dark at runtime
chrome.navigation_behavior: brand -> /; optional divider + nav.section (link if sectionHref) + <=3 anchor nav.links; per-page HEADER_NAV defined inline
chrome.cta_behavior: Button gradient sm arrow -> cta; default 'Launch App'; blog layout overrides 'Book a demo' -> /#demo
constraints: standard chrome for every internal page

chrome.name: HeaderThemeSync
chrome.theme_behavior: rAF-throttled; elementsFromPoint at header bottom detects .band underneath; toggles page-header--dark when band .ink; hide-on-scroll-down/show-on-up

chrome.name: Footer
chrome.cta_behavior: two CTAs: 'Book a call' (gradient if dark / primary if light) + 'Try live demo' (GLASS if dark / ghost if light)
constraints: dark footer 'Try live demo' uses variant=glass => MUST render shared liquid-glass material (.foot.is-dark .btn-glass is in the liquid-glass selector group)
WARN: both footer CTAs currently have NO href in code

nav.name: site-nav

exports.NEWSROOM_NAV: const SectionNav preset (Newsroom; /blog#latest|#loop|#more) — used by blog/layout only
exports.LAUNCH_CTA: const { label:'Launch App', href:'/#demo' } — PageHeader default cta

notes: per-page nav decentralized (each page declares local HEADER_NAV)
LAUNCH_CTA.href '/#demo' is a documented placeholder (TODO real app URL)
